description: New Orleans gas rate structure — identical for Entergy and Delta except PGA. Source: actual bills, City Council docket UD-24-01.

notes.streetUseFranchiseFee: 5.27% of all gas charges before city tax
notes.cityTax: 3% of all charges including franchise fee
notes.ccfToMMBtu: 1 CCF ≈ 0.1037 MMBtu for Henry Hub price conversion
